mapper.sql: CASE q.status WHEN 1 THEN 'WAITING' WHEN 2 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN 4 THEN 'FAILED' ELSE NULL END

q.id AS id, q.public_id::text AS publicKey, q.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.code AS hospitalCode, h.name AS hospitalName, q.patient_id AS patientId, p.public_id::text AS patientPublicKey, p.patient_uid AS patientUid, NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(p.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(p.last_name, ''))), '') AS patientName, p.date_of_birth AS dob, p.gender AS sex, q.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, COALESCE(m.name, '') AS modalityName, COALESCE(selected_cfg.dicom_server_id, s.dicom_server_id) AS dicomServerId, selected_route.id AS dicomRouteId, q.visit_code AS visitCode, COALESCE(s.accession_number, q.visit_code) AS accessionNumber, s.reference_visit_code AS referenceVisitCode, COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), NULLIF(s.modality, ''), NULLIF(m.name, ''), '') AS modalityCode, selected_machine.machine_ae_title AS machineAeTitle, q.study_description AS studyDescription, q.scheduled_date AS scheduledDate, q.scheduled_time AS scheduledTime, q.study_id AS studyId, s.public_id::text AS studyPublicKey, s.study_instance_uid AS studyUuid, q.dicom_server_worklist_id AS dicomServerWorklistId, q.dicom_server_worklist_path AS dicomServerWorklistPath, s.dicom_server_study_id AS dicomServerStudyId, s.study_instance_uid AS studyInstanceUid, s.dicom_server_patient_id AS dicomServerPatientId, s.dicom_server_series_id AS dicomServerSeriesId, NULL::TEXT AS viewerUrl, q.error_message AS errorMessage, TO_CHAR(q.sent_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sentAt, TO_CHAR(q.received_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS receivedAt, TO_CHAR(q.started_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startedAt, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(q.image_received_at, q.received_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS imageReceivedAt, TO_CHAR(q.cancelled_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS cancelledAt, AS status, q.created_by AS createdBy, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(q.created_at, q.created), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt

AND q.study_id IS NULL AND COALESCE(q.image_received_at, q.received_at) IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pacs_worklist_study_links active_qsl WHERE active_qsl.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND active_qsl.worklist_id = q.id AND active_qsl.is_primary = 1 )

LEFT JOIN pacs_worklist_study_links qsl ON qsl.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND qsl.worklist_id = q.id AND qsl.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN pacs_studies s ON s.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND s.id = COALESCE(q.study_id, qsl.study_id) AND s.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN hospital_modality_server_routes selected_route ON selected_route.id = q.dicom_route_id AND selected_route.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND selected_route.modality_id = q.modality_id LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs selected_cfg ON selected_cfg.id = selected_route.routing_config_id AND selected_cfg.hospital_id = selected_route.hospital_id AND selected_cfg.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_machines selected_machine ON selected_machine.id = selected_route.machine_id AND selected_machine.hospital_id = selected_route.hospital_id AND selected_machine.modality_id = selected_route.modality_id AND selected_machine.is_active = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pacs_worklists q
INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id

INSERT INTO pacs_visit_sequences ( hospital_id, sequence_date, last_sequence, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{sequenceKey}, 1, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, sequence_date) DO UPDATE SET last_sequence = pacs_visit_sequences.last_sequence + 1, modified_at = NOW() RETURNING last_sequence
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pacs_worklists ( hospital_id, patient_id, modality_id, visit_code, status, study_description, scheduled_date, scheduled_time, notes, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, created, modified ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{request.patientId}, #{request.modalityId}, #{visitCode}, 1, #{request.studyDescription}, #{request.scheduledDate}, #{request.scheduledTime}, #{request.notes}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND q.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND LOWER(q.visit_code) = LOWER(#{visitCode}) LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE LOWER(q.visit_code) = LOWER(#{visitCode}) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pacs_worklists SET status = #{statusCode}, notes = COALESCE(#{request.notes}, notes), modified_by = NULL, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{request.id}
UPDATE pacs_worklists SET status = #{statusCode}, error_message = NULL, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id}

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET status = #{statusCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = CASE WHEN #{statusCode} = 2 THEN COALESCE(started_at, NOW()) ELSE started_at END, cancelled_at = CASE WHEN #{statusCode} = 3 THEN COALESCE(cancelled_at, NOW()) ELSE cancelled_at END, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id}

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET status = #{statusCode}, dicom_route_id = #{dicomRouteId}, study_description = #{studyDescription}, scheduled_date = #{scheduledDate}, scheduled_time = #{scheduledTime}, dicom_server_worklist_id = #{worklistId}, dicom_server_worklist_path = #{worklistPath}, error_message = NULL, sent_at = NOW(), started_at = COALESCE(started_at, NOW()), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id} AND status IN (1, 4)

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET modality_id = #{request.modalityId}, notes = #{request.notes}, study_description = #{studyDescription}, scheduled_date = #{scheduledDate}, scheduled_time = #{scheduledTime}, error_message = NULL, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id} AND status IN (1, 4)

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET modality_id = COALESCE(#{modalityId}, modality_id), study_description = #{studyDescription}, scheduled_date = #{scheduledDate}, scheduled_time = #{scheduledTime}, dicom_server_worklist_id = #{worklistId}, dicom_server_worklist_path = #{worklistPath}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id}

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET dicom_route_id = #{dicomRouteId}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id} AND (dicom_route_id IS NULL OR dicom_route_id != #{dicomRouteId})

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET study_id = #{studyId}, status = #{statusCode}, error_message = NULL, received_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), image_received_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND LOWER(visit_code) = LOWER(#{visitCode})

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET study_id = #{studyId}, status = #{statusCode}, error_message = NULL, received_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), image_received_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id} AND status = 2

UPDATE pacs_worklists SET study_id = #{studyId}, status = #{statusCode}, error_message = NULL, received_at = COALESCE(received_at, CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), image_received_at = COALESCE(image_received_at, CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id}
UPDATE pacs_worklists SET study_id = COALESCE(#{studyId}, study_id), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW(), modified = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id = #{id}

INSERT INTO pacs_worklist_study_links ( hospital_id, worklist_id, study_id, is_primary, linked_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{worklistId}, #{studyId}, 1, NOW(), #{createdBy} ) ON CONFLICT (hospital_id, worklist_id, study_id) DO UPDATE SET is_primary = 1, linked_at = NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pacs_worklist_histories ( hospital_id, worklist_id, patient_id, from_status, to_status, action, reason, created, created_by ) SELECT #{hospitalId}, pq.id, pq.patient_id, #{fromStatusCode}, #{toStatusCode}, #{action}, #{reason}, NOW(), #{createdBy} FROM pacs_worklists pq WHERE pq.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND pq.id = #{worklistId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE LOWER(q.visit_code) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) OR LOWER(s.accession_number) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) OR LOWER(s.reference_visit_code) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND ( LOWER(q.visit_code) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) OR LOWER(s.accession_number) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) OR LOWER(s.reference_visit_code) = LOWER(#{accessionNumber}) ) ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE ( (#{studyInstanceUid} IS NOT NULL AND #{studyInstanceUid} != '' AND LOWER(s.study_instance_uid) = LOWER(#{studyInstanceUid})) OR (#{dicomServerStudyId} IS NOT NULL AND #{dicomServerStudyId} != '' AND LOWER(s.dicom_server_study_id) = LOWER(#{dicomServerStudyId})) ) ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND ( (#{studyInstanceUid} IS NOT NULL AND #{studyInstanceUid} != '' AND LOWER(s.study_instance_uid) = LOWER(#{studyInstanceUid})) OR (#{dicomServerStudyId} IS NOT NULL AND #{dicomServerStudyId} != '' AND LOWER(s.dicom_server_study_id) = LOWER(#{dicomServerStudyId})) ) ORDER BY q.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.status = 1 ORDER BY q.id ASC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM pacs_worklists q INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN patients p ON p.id = q.patient_id LEFT JOIN modalities m ON m.id = q.modality_id
WHERE q.status = 2 AND q.visit_code IS NOT NULL AND q.visit_code != ''
ORDER BY q.id ASC
